text: 20. Change orders for additional scopes of work to be submitted for approval are not to exceed 15% markup or the limit set forth in the agreement between the Contractor and the Owner. Subcontractors Change proposals must break -down proposed cost changes satisfactory to Contractor. Any Changes agreed to be completed on a Time and Material (T&M) basis is not to exceed 15% mark-up or the limit set forth in the agreement between the Contractor and the Owner. Subcontractors must submit Daily Time and Material Slips signed by the on-site superintendent as buck-up for work completed.
